name: Djurs Sommerland
description:
Djurs Sommerland is an amusement park located in Djursland, Denmark, just north of the village of Nimtofte, 23 kilometers west of Grenaa, and 36 kilometers east of Randers. 

The park opened in 1981, and it has progressively expanded every year since then.  Its guests mostly consist of families, as most of the rides are aimed at kids and teenagers.
